meta.description: Consumable items for healing and support. Stim Packs target organic creatures (Medicine skill), Repair Patches target droids (Mechanics skill). Both have diminishing returns per figure per encounter: healing = max(1, baseValue - priorUses * 2). Strain recovery items have no skill check and no diminishing returns.

stim-pack.name: Stim Pack
stim-pack.description: Military-grade stimulant injector. Heals wounds on organic targets. Less effective with repeated use as the body builds tolerance.

repair-patch.name: Repair Patch
repair-patch.description: Emergency droid repair kit with micro-welders and circuit sealant. Repairs damage on mechanical targets. Components degrade with repeated application to the same chassis.

adrenaline-stim.name: Adrenaline Stim
adrenaline-stim.description: Combat stimulant that clears fatigue and sharpens focus. Recovers strain on organic targets.

emergency-repair-kit.name: Emergency Repair Kit
emergency-repair-kit.description: Portable diagnostic and reset tool for droids. Clears processing errors and resets overloaded circuits.

bacta-infusion.name: Bacta Infusion
bacta-infusion.description: Premium bacta compound in a pressurized applicator. Provides superior wound recovery compared to standard stim packs.
